name: Giant Raisin Oat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Quaker Oat Bran Hot Cereal - Uncooked
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:35
1. Beat sugar, corn syrup, and margarine until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg whites and orange peel and beat until well blended.
3. Gradually add combined oat bran, flour, oats, and baking soda, mixing well.
4. Stir in raisins.
5. Drop by scant 1/4 cup onto ungreased cookie sheet; gently press into 3-inch circles.
6. Bake for 14-16 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool 1 minute on cookie sheet.
Can be frozen: Thaw in microwave on high for about 30 seconds.
